params.amount: The amount of hBTC to deposit.

params.targetUser: The address of the user to liquidate.

params.isLong: True for a long position, false for short.
params.sizeUsd: The size of the position in USD.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

closePosition().notice: Closes an existing position and settles P&L.

depositCollateral(uint256).notice: Deposits hBTC collateral into the vault.

liquidate(address).notice: Liquidates an undercollateralized user position by a keeper bot.

openPosition(uint256,bool).notice: Opens a new perpetual swap position.

setRiskParameters(uint256,uint256).notice: Updates the risk parameters using Basis Points.
